instruction: Sum the even numbers from 1 to 12 and print the total.
Sum the even numbers from 1 to 12 and print the total.
code:
DIM s = 0
FOR i = 1 TO 12
    IF (i MOD 2) = 0 THEN
        s = s + i
    ENDIF
NEXT
PRINT s

FOR i = 1 TO 12
    IF (i MOD 2) = 0 THEN
        s = s + i
    ENDIF
NEXT
PRINT s
